description: India Book III,29c: Responsa in Avraham Ibn Yiju's hand: legitimacy of a manumitted female slave's marriage and status of her children, Yemen, ca. 1140. When he first published them in 1986, Friedman believed that the responsa were probably from the eleventh century, but he later identified the hand as Ibn Yijū's.
tags: India, IB3, Ibn Yiju, ib-untranslated-eng, Responsum, slave
description_he: ספר הודו III,29ג: תשובות בכתב אברהם אבן יג'ו על נישואי עבדה משוחררת ומעמד ילדיה, תימן, כ-1140
